name: Yanco Delta Wind Farm
current_developer: Yanco Delta Wind Farm Pty Ltd

timeline.title: NSW consent (Dec 2023)
timeline.detail: Yanco Delta received NSW state planning consent in Dec 2023.

timeline.title: EPBC approval (Feb 2024) — modifications underway
timeline.detail: Federal EPBC Act approval granted Feb 2024. Modifications to the approved design currently underway.

timeline.title: South-West REZ grid access right secured
timeline.detail: Yanco Delta secured 1,460 MW of SW REZ grid access rights — full project allocation.

sources.title: Andrew Forrest among big winners as NSW grants grid access (RenewEconomy)

timeline.title: CIS Tender 7 underwriting awarded
timeline.detail: Origin Energy's Yanco Delta wins CIS Tender 7 underwriting — 1,450 MW awarded under the federal Capacity Investment Scheme. Largest single wind project in Australia.

sources.title: Australia's biggest wind project among 19 winners of largest renewable auction (RenewEconomy)

stakeholder_issues.detail: Origin targeting financial close around mid-FY27 (late 2026 / early 2027). 800 MWh battery component sits outside CIS scope. Watch for Stage 1 / 2 phasing as project approaches FID.
